label: Fish-Man Island deep geographic system

identity.name: Fish-Man Island
identity.region: Grand Line beneath the Red Line

atlas_anchor.warning: The deterministic atlas pin places the local scene; it is not a canon survey coordinate.

chapter_contract.runtime_rule: The descent from chapter 602 is owned by components/fishman.ts. The complete island GLB remains hidden until the crew enters Fish-Man Island in chapter 608.

rejected_upstream_gate.reason: An upstream location debut value is not the Straw Hats' route arrival and leaked the complete island 540 chapters early.

evidence.claim: The Straw Hats enter Fish-Man Island; Mermaid Cove and Fish-Man District are shown.
The local voyage waypoint records Fish-Man Island arrival.

unresolved: The atlas anchor is derived rather than a canon coordinate.
This contract corrects the whole-model spoiler gate but does not assert independent local-camera anchors for every district.
